mdRecord.dcterms:title: George W. and Laura Jenkins Shelor Family
mdRecord.dcterms:description: George W. and Laura Jenkins Shelor family Oldest to youngest children: Carl E., Fred Henry, Mason F., (Flora died infant), Charles Luther, Ola W., Brewster E., Pelham Leonard, G. Cabell, (Field Scott died infant), Claude Swanson, John (killed in accident), Sarah (Sadie) L.
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
